summary: Verification pass after code-review fixes (DOMPurify XSS sanitization on PostView, AuthContext/ThemeContext useMemo+useCallback, env-var fallbacks for test creds). XSS test PASSED: malicious post containing and was created via API, rendered via /post/:id, and confirmed sanitized — no script tags, no onerror attribute, no alert/sentinel fired, safe tags (p/strong/blockquote/h2) intact. Backend regression: 21/21 pytest cases pass. AuthContext memoization works: login, navigation, and presence heartbeat all fire normally (multiple POST /api/presence/heartbeat observed after navigation between dashboard, feed, and post pages). Delete flow + theme toggle also re-verified.
critical_code_review_comments: DOMPurify config in PostView.jsx is strict and correct (explicit ALLOWED_TAGS / ALLOWED_ATTR including target/rel for links; URI regexp guards javascript: schemes). useMemo placement now safe (before early returns).

AuthContext useMemo dependency list includes user/loading/loginEmail/register/logout/checkAuth — verified by observed re-renders (heartbeat continues firing after navigation, user.user_id available on PostView for owner-only Edit/Delete buttons).

Backend still serializes post.content verbatim; sanitization is client-side only. This is the correct boundary (HTML preserved for editor round-trip, sanitized at render). If server-side rendering or RSS/email is ever added, sanitization must be reapplied there too — worth a comment in server.py near posts serializer.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested flows (XSS, login, navigation, heartbeat, edit/delete UI, theme toggle)

test_credentials: demo@tanijournal.com / Tani@2026 (env-var TANI_DEMO_EMAIL / TANI_DEMO_PASSWORD fallback verified — pytest still passes without explicitly setting them).
seed_data_creation: Created and immediately deleted one TEST_XSS_Verification post via API+UI. No residual data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All code-review fixes verified. XSS attack vector (script tag + img onerror) is correctly stripped by DOMPurify; window.__xss_fired and window.__alert_fired both stayed false even after 2s settle. Backend test suite unchanged in behaviour after env-var fallback refactor — runs cleanly via `pytest backend/tests/test_tani_journal.py -v -o addopts=''`. Note: a 'logout-btn' data-testid was not found in the top-bar avatar (logout may live inside a dropdown that wasn't expanded); not a regression and not in scope of this review, but main agent may want to add data-testid to the logout menu item for future testability.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional issues found in this iteration.
